public_profile.title: Public Profile
public_profile.description: Publicly accessible profile information for a user.

role.description: Role representation for role-based access control

avatarColor.description: Selected avatar display color hex code

private_info.title: Private Information
private_info.description: Highly restricted sensitive user profile information.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was initialized

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user last successful sign-in

providerId.description: Provider method for authentication (google.com or password)

audit_log.title: Audit Log
audit_log.description: Historic security events logged inside the application.

userId.description: ID of the user triggering this action

userEmail.description: Email address of the user for admin visibility

action.description: Type of event (LOGIN, REGISTER, PROFILE_RENAME, ROLE_CHANGE)

details.description: Literal details describing the context of the action

timestamp.description: Strict server timestamp indicating when event occurred

/users/{userId}/public/profile.description: Stores user publicly readable name and application security role.

/users/{userId}/private/info.description: Stores user private PII, only readable by the owner themselves or system admins.

/logs/{logId}.description: A collection containing historical security auditing information.
